# Downstream Handoff Rules

## To review-quality-desk

Send PR-specific failure risks, changed files linked to failed checks, missing tests, and review questions.

## To test-strategy-desk

Send recurring failures, flaky areas, missing fixtures, insufficient regression coverage, and test-design gaps.

## To verification-desk

Send failed acceptance gates, CI evidence, test result gaps, and release-blocking checks.

## To release-operations-desk

Send release-blocking CI state, required rerun/fix decision, and pre-release gate status.

## To incident-response-desk

Send CI outages, production deployment failures, external-service failures, or workflow incidents that affect delivery.

## To issue-planning-desk

Send fix work that needs issue decomposition, acceptance criteria, labels, dependencies, or milestone planning.

## To implementation-handoff-desk

Send bounded implementation-ready fix work. Include repo, branch, PR, failing checks, logs, files, validation commands, out-of-scope boundaries, and halt conditions.
